'''Vikas Sleer''' was the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] owner of a pawn shop on [[Phyrstal Island]] in the resort city of [[Le Yer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He loved to haggle and would spend hours bargaining over the most mundane of items.

{{Char-stub}}
